records.quote: We replaced three internal tools with one canvas. The unit system alone paid for the license.
records.name: Sofia Brandt

records.quote: The layer tree stays responsive with 4,000 nodes. Our old editor gave up at 400.
records.name: Jae Park

records.quote: Collections turned our brand templates into a pipeline. Designers bind fields, data does the rest.
records.name: Elena Ruiz

records.quote: Every control is keyboardable. Our power users never touch the mouse.
records.name: Marcus Webb

records.quote: It looks like nothing — which is exactly right. The work is the interface.
records.name: Yuki Tanaka
